hero.title: Sports Correspondent
hero.tagline: Chasing the story past the final whistle — across football Sundays, NBA overtimes, pit lane, and everything in between.

about.name: Logan Starkey
paragraphs: I started out covering high school football for a paper that no longer exists, and I've spent every year since chasing the same feeling: the moment a locker room stops performing for the cameras and starts telling the truth.
Six years in, I've filed from press boxes, pit lanes, and one particularly cold speed-skating oval, always looking for the person the broadcast doesn't have time for.
about.pullQuote: The scoreboard tells you what happened. My job is to tell you why it mattered.

contact.sub: Open to staff, freelance, and stringer assignments — remote or on the road.

footer: © 2026 LOGAN STARKEY — BUILT FOR THE NEXT ASSIGNMENT
